cause_analysis.narrative: Moya Moya Sea of Creations | Braids & Locs & Nail Art churned on 2026-02-11 after 344 days with Zoca. They sent an explicit cancellation request on 2025-12-31 via app_chat — 42 days before churn. Classification: explicit cancellation. The client formally asked to cancel; the question is whether a save attempt was made. 2 inbound message(s) went unanswered for 5+ days — this is the clearest operational failure on Zoca's side.
recommendations: [Retention] Cancellation was signalled 42 day(s) before churn via app_chat. Trigger an AM save call within 4 hours of any cancellation keyword — not a support response.
[Offer] Build a 3-tier retention offer ladder (pause / discount / scope change) so AMs have something concrete to counter with.
[SLA] 2 inbound message(s) went unanswered for 5+ days. Enforce a hard rule: every inbound gets a human response within 24h, every day of the week.

[SLA example] On 2026-03-13 via email, client wrote: "Subject: Let's Track Your Progress & Grow Together\n\nBody: Let's Connect & Grow Together A Note From Your Growth Partne…" — no outbound response in 30 days.

Hi Tenille, I hope you are well. We apologise for any inconvenience we might have caused you here.  You requested a reduction in your monthly fee which was approved by Management and hence we did multiple outreach to discuss that with you.
We truly believe the traffic on the profile will get better with time as year ends are generally slow. Please let us know what you think, we will be happy to hop on a call.
We look forward to hearing back from you so we can sort this out at the earliest.

Wishing you a Merry Christmas and a lovely festive season! Thank you so much for your trust and support this year - it’s truly been a pleasure working with you and being part of your journey.
